name: Flax Seeds
shortDescription: Nutty, versatile flax seeds for breakfast bowls, baking, smoothies, and simple everyday food routines.
description: Agree Superfoods Flax Seeds are a practical pantry ingredient for breakfast, baking, and everyday recipe use.
fullDescription: Flax seeds are a useful ingredient for households that enjoy building small, repeatable food habits. They work in oats, smoothies, baking, and topping routines while keeping the pantry feeling simple and versatile.

Agree Superfoods positions flax seeds as an everyday ingredient rather than a complicated wellness product. The emphasis is on steady kitchen use, approachable guidance, and a clean premium presentation.
benefits: Works well in breakfast, baking, and smoothie routines
Adds nutty pantry variety to simple everyday recipes
Easy to pair with other seed and breakfast staples
usageIdeas: Add to oats, yogurt bowls, or home baking mixes
Blend into smoothies or sprinkle over breakfast plates
Use in crackers, bars, and seed-forward snack recipes
bestFor: Customers building easy breakfast and baking routines
Pantry assortments focused on everyday seed use
Retailers looking for practical, familiar wellness foods

productDetails.label: Storage
productDetails.value: Keep sealed in a cool, dry place

highlights.description: Works across smoothies, oats, baking, and topping routines.

highlights.title: Range role
highlights.description: A practical seed that supports repeat use and simple meal ideas.

faqs.question: Where do flax seeds fit into a daily routine?
faqs.answer: They are often used in breakfast bowls, smoothies, baking, and homemade snack recipes.

faqs.question: Are flax seeds hard to work with?
faqs.answer: No. They are a flexible pantry ingredient that can be added to many familiar meals with very little effort.
